case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KARLA GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-18-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS NO SASE. ENDORSED FILED COPY LEFT IN OUTBOX IN DEPT. 501.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-18-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA
DECLARATION OF NICHOLE SANTIAGO IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION / $22.13 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, KARLA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
